mapper.sql: id, area_id, store_no, store_name, store_address, max_longitude, max_latitude, min_longitude, min_latitude, longitude, latitude, store_introduce, start_time, close_time, store_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into store (id, area_id, store_no, store_name, store_address, max_longitude, max_latitude, min_longitude, min_latitude, longitude, latitude, store_introduce, start_time, close_time, store_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{areaId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{maxLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{minLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{minLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{storeIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{storeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

area_id,
store_no,
store_name,

min_longitude,
min_latitude,
longitude,
latitude,

mapper.update:
update store
area_id = #{areaId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_address = #{storeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_longitude = #{maxLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
max_latitude = #{maxLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
min_longitude = #{minLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
min_latitude = #{minLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
store_introduce = #{storeIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIME},
close_time = #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIME},
store_status = #{storeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update store set area_id = #{areaId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_address = #{storeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_longitude = #{maxLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, max_latitude = #{maxLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, min_longitude = #{minLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, min_latitude = #{minLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, store_introduce = #{storeIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIME}, close_time = #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIME}, store_status = #{storeStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
